name: Air France

carryOn.notes: Economy/Premium Economy: 1 bag + 1 accessory (12 kg total). Business/La Première: 2 bags + 1 accessory (18 kg total).

economy.notes: Included on most routes. Light fares may exclude checked bag.

batteryRules.lithiumIon: Carry-on only for spare lithium batteries
batteryRules.spareBatteries: Max 100Wh per battery. 101–160Wh with airline approval.

restrictedItems: Smart bags with non-removable lithium batteries

faqs.question: Does Air France include free checked bags?
faqs.answer: Yes, most Air France fares include at least one checked bag (23 kg). Light fares on short-haul European flights may not include checked bags.
